---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for CyberSense
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
Explain the problem this feature would solve or the value it would add.

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## 📸 Mockups/Examples
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other applications.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
What would make this feature complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🎨 User Story
As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## 📊 Priority
- [ ] High - Critical for project
- [ ] Medium - Important but not critical
- [ ] Low - Nice to have

## 🏗️ Implementation Notes
Any technical considerations or implementation ideas?

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context or information about the feature request here.
